responsibilities: Design, build and maintain scalable backend services and API architectures. Collaborate with frontend and ML engineers to deploy models and optimize database queries.

Define product features, run backlog grooming, and write user stories. Engage with customers and stakeholders to gather feedback and drive requirements.
